name: Modern Open Kids' Nightstand White - Pillowfort™
description:
Even small rooms can get an instant upgrade with the convenience of this simple yet stylish Modern Open Nightstand from Pillowfort™. Featuring a square shape with an open front and four legs, this white and natural wood nightstand is perfect for placing next to their bed with a lamp on top and their favorite bedtime stories or stuffed animals inside. The open design lets you display decorative items while also providing easy access to contents. Plus, the clean lines, slender legs and white color palette coordinate easily with a wide variety of bedroom decor.

Overall Width: 16.57 inches
Overall Depth: 13.6 inches
Overall Height: 22.87 inches
Distance from Floor to Bottom of Nightstand: 8.58 inches
Interior Width of Cubby: 15 inches
Interior Depth of Cubby: 13 inches
Interior Height of Cubby: 13 inches
